mapper.sql: id, project_id AS projectId, project_name AS projectName, task_id AS taskId, task_name AS taskName, result_type AS resultType, result_name AS resultName, result_desc AS resultDesc, save_status AS saveStatus, file_size AS fileSize, file_md5 AS fileMd5, save_path AS savePath, save_directory AS saveDirectory, file_name AS fileName, save_format AS saveFormat, remark, create_date AS createDate, save_date AS saveDate
mapper.select: SELECT , file_content AS fileContent FROM project_result WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_result (project_id, project_name, task_id, task_name, result_type, result_name, result_desc, save_status, file_size, file_md5, save_path, save_directory, file_name, save_format, file_content, remark, user_id, organ_id, create_date, save_date) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{resultType}, #{resultName}, #{resultDesc}, #{saveStatus}, #{fileSize}, #{fileMd5}, #{savePath}, #{saveDirectory}, #{fileName}, #{saveFormat}, #{fileContent}, #{remark}, #{userId}, #{organId}, NOW(), #{saveDate})
mapper.update:
UPDATE project_result
result_name = #{resultName}, result_desc = #{resultDesc}, save_status = #{saveStatus}, save_path = #{savePath}, save_directory = #{saveDirectory}, file_name = #{fileName}, save_format = #{saveFormat}, file_content = #{fileContent}, remark = #{remark}, save_date = #{saveDate}, id = id
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

UPDATE project_result SET save_status = 1, save_date = NOW(), save_path = COALESCE(save_path, CONCAT(COALESCE(save_directory, '/data/results'), '/', COALESCE(file_name, result_name, id))) WHERE is_del = 0 AND id IN
#{item}
UPDATE project_result SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, default_path AS defaultPath, auto_save AS autoSave, retention_days AS retentionDays, max_storage_gb AS maxStorageGB, update_date AS updateDate FROM project_result_config WHERE id = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_result_config (id, default_path, auto_save, retention_days, max_storage_gb, update_date) VALUES (1, #{defaultPath}, #{autoSave}, #{retentionDays}, #{maxStorageGB}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE project_result_config
default_path = #{defaultPath}, auto_save = #{autoSave}, retention_days = #{retentionDays}, max_storage_gb = #{maxStorageGB}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = 1
